name: codexy
description: Codex orchestrator scaffolding for atomic agent workflows, verification, evidence capture, and merge-safe execution.

interface.shortDescription: Run Codex work through atomic orchestration, evidence, review, and merge gates.
interface.longDescription: Codexy starts as an orchestrator for Codex work: it decomposes broad requests into issue-sized lanes, routes work through specialist roles and skills, verifies real surfaces, and keeps pull requests behind review and squash-merge gates.
defaultPrompt: Use Codexy as orchestrator; split the request into atomic issue-sized lanes before editing.
Track goals and todos; assign specialist roles with multi-agent or multi-thread work.
Verify evidence, require Codex review, and use squash-merge gates before completion.
